title: Water flask
description:
A small mod that adds a water flask to carry water with you on the go.
Carries up to 6 bottles worth.
body:
# Water flask
  A quality of life mod adding water flasks to easily store and take multiple bottles of water with you wherever you may need them. Perfect for exploration through the desert, savannah or waterless caves!
  
  made in response to [Spice of Life: Valheim](https://modrinth.com/mod/spice-of-life-valheim-edition)'s drinking variable.


---
## Features
![ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2339defda1b099e91de25023f7508b3d519f4fd8.png)

features a fully textured 3d model both on the ground,

![in hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0fe18aefb1c06a2211458cdce4507e7334c9222.png)

and when in the players hand!
  
---
## Compatibility

  (slight) compatibility with Spice of Life: Valheim. You can add/change the SoL: Valheim config files to further change it's integration.
  ![SoL Valheim compat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1ea7a788f586f41a6425d941b23452b62cfda27.png)
  ![EMI compat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07c09cf18a6ecf3c67fcec4c52490fcf02cc391e.png)
 
  Also compatible with EMI for as far as i could test


### Crafting recipe
![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18089c4afd00dc2aa370b4305cc1bf96f4fe0454.png)
